title: senecio talquinus
intro: Senecio talquinus, also known as Talque or Tall Groundsel, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, reducing fever, and supporting the digestive system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Senecio talquinus can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
